emails.subject: Your subscription is confirmed
emails.body:
Hello,

Thanks for confirming your subscription to the EnergyEU briefing. You're receiving this because you opted in on our website on the date shown in your account.

We only use your email to send this briefing. You can opt-out at any time, and you can manage your email preferences from the link below.

— EnergyEU

Manage your preferences or opt-out: https://energyeu.example/preferences?id=2204
EnergyEU SARL, 12 Rue de la Loi, 1040 Brussels, Belgium

emails.subject: Briefing #1: the week in European power markets
emails.body:
Hello,

This week: German day-ahead prices eased as wind output recovered, while French nuclear availability held steady.

Full charts are in the member area.

— EnergyEU

To stop receiving this, unsubscribe here: https://energyeu.example/unsubscribe?id=2204
EnergyEU SARL, 12 Rue de la Loi, 1040 Brussels, Belgium
